classes.label: Education Experience
classes.description: A record of a person's learning history, including dates, institution, content, major, and degree.

classes.label: Work Experience
classes.description: A record of a person's employment history, including dates, employer, job content, and positions held.
evidence: 曾任专业技 术职务码

classes.label: Party Membership
classes.description: Records related to an individual's participation in a political party, including joining dates, sponsors, and status changes.

classes.label: Enrollment Information
classes.description: Specific details regarding the start of an educational period, including the date and method of study.

datatype_properties.label: Start Date
datatype_properties.description: The date when the learning period began.

datatype_properties.label: End Date
datatype_properties.description: The date when the learning period ended.

datatype_properties.label: Institution Name
datatype_properties.description: The name of the school or learning institution.

datatype_properties.label: Study Content
datatype_properties.description: Description of the content studied.

datatype_properties.label: Major Name
datatype_properties.description: The name of the major or field of study.

datatype_properties.label: Degree Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the degree obtained.

datatype_properties.label: Reference Name
datatype_properties.description: Name of the person who can verify the learning experience.

datatype_properties.label: Education Note
datatype_properties.description: Supplementary notes regarding the education resume.

datatype_properties.label: Job Start Date
datatype_properties.description: The date when the work period began.

datatype_properties.label: Job End Date
datatype_properties.description: The date when the work period ended.

datatype_properties.label: Employer Name
datatype_properties.description: The name of the company or work unit.

datatype_properties.label: Job Description
datatype_properties.description: Description of the work content.

datatype_properties.label: Political Position
datatype_properties.description: Previously held party or government position.

datatype_properties.label: Technical Position Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for previously held professional technical positions.
evidence: 曾任专业技 术职务码

datatype_properties.label: Work Reference Name
datatype_properties.description: Name of the person who can verify the work experience.

datatype_properties.label: Work Note
datatype_properties.description: Supplementary notes regarding the work resume.

datatype_properties.label: Join Date
datatype_properties.description: Date of joining the party.

datatype_properties.label: Joining Unit
datatype_properties.description: The unit the individual belonged to when joining the party.

datatype_properties.label: Sponsor Name
datatype_properties.description: Name of the person who introduced the individual to the party.

datatype_properties.label: Regularization Date
datatype_properties.description: Date when the individual became a full member according to party rules.

datatype_properties.label: Abnormal Category Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the category of abnormality in party membership.

datatype_properties.label: Abnormal Reason
datatype_properties.description: Explanation for the abnormality.

datatype_properties.label: Abnormal Date
datatype_properties.description: Date of the abnormal event.

datatype_properties.label: Transfer In Date
datatype_properties.description: Date of transferring into the current party unit.

datatype_properties.label: Previous Unit
datatype_properties.description: The unit before the transfer.

datatype_properties.label: Transfer Out Date
datatype_properties.description: Date of transferring out of a party unit.

datatype_properties.label: Destination Unit
datatype_properties.description: The unit after the transfer.

datatype_properties.label: Enrollment Date
datatype_properties.description: Date of enrollment.

datatype_properties.label: Study Method Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the method of study.

datatype_properties.label: Study Form Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the form of study.

evidence: EnrollmentInfo contains specific start-of-study details relevant to an EducationExperience.
